{{Quote|I'll just let you pass. The boys in the office may require authorization in triplicate, but not me.|Billan to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Billan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] employee of the [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]].

==Biography==
In [[3956 BBY]], Billan was assigned as the gatekeeper to the entrance of [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He was known for his expediency and disdain of the bureaucratic mentality, as he would frequently allow known [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] to leave the [[City/Legends|city]] without having to go through the somewhat laborious process of verifying their hunting licenses.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
